---

How Meeting Rooms Fits Into the Dashboard

Answer: This does match. It shows device number, number of seats and status in current table section. The tables would be swapped out for Rooms. There should also be a hourly rate of each different room stated alongside.

Notes: : Live Status should be either Available, Reserved, In-Use, Under Maintenance

- Reserved will be shown at the time the slot is supposed to begin. In-Use will be shown when start meeting is clicked on Luxegenie.

---

Recurring Bookings

Answer:

- Repeat Patterns: Weekly, Monthly (upto 6 months)  
- Need to see how someone booking can do recurring bookings  
- Clash: Flag for staff to sort out

Notes:

---

Food & Beverage Ordering

Answer:

- Manual Staff Review & Punch is okay. The order will be manually done on the dashboard. Room No should be selected.  
- Specially Curated Meeting Room Menu  
- Management using the dashboard

Notes:

---

Payments & Billing

Answer:

- POS  
- Choose from different payment methods when requesting for bill. One option can be selected.  
- Staff will always be present

Notes:

---

Staff Roles & Permissions

Answer: Anyone with access to manager's dashboard (Access will be given to management)

Notes:

---

Booking Screen: List vs. Calendar

Answer: When? (Date)\* For how long? (Duration) How many seater? (Number of Seats) What time? (Slot)

\*Option for recurring booking

Algorithm checks and tells what matches requirements and shows slots available

Meeting Rooms with their hourly rates are shown according to the constraints mentioned.

Reference image: ![][image1]

Notes: As of now, members/guests can make the booking via WhatsApp/Phone/Email through the management. Later on, we plan to implement an app/web-app wherein the members/guests can make the bookings themselves.

---

Membership & Q Pay

Answer:

- Yes (Member IDs have corresponding info)  
- System kmows

Notes:

---

Cancellation & Extension Rules

Answer:

- Dependent on management  
- Extend meeting option will show management will get in touch with you. Management must be alerted in the dashboard.  
- Reminder 10 mins before end time.  
- Slot ended message when meeting ends.

Notes:

---

What We Track & Measure

Answer: At a glance- Total Revenue, Meeting Room Rent, F\&B Revenue, Number of Service Calls, Average Ratings (Club Rating \+ Luxegenie Rating), Total number of Bookings, Total Duration of bookings, Preferred Payment Mode %/value

Notes: View History was not viewed during original session. All metrics are shown in that. GitHub repository being shared for further and detailed assessment.
